releaseNotes: Added Recent Files support with the last 10 opened and saved stadium files.
Added Clear Recent Files and automatic cleanup for missing recent files.
Added Crash Recovery system for recovering unsaved stadium work after unexpected shutdowns.
Added startup recovery dialog with Recover, Open Folder and Discard options.
Improved AutoSave integration with recovery state tracking.
Normal Save and Save As now clear recovery state after a successful save.
Added optional save/export color validation and auto-fix flow.
Improved Stadium Validator checks for segments, goals, joints, colors, traits, ball physics and invalid numeric values.
Improved large map performance with render throttling, viewport culling, lazy JSON updates and lazy Layers updates.
Updated HaxStudio UI version labels to 1.2.0.
